programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Discover the explosive origins of the San Francisco thrash scene. From garage rehearsals to the first club riots, see how bands like Metallica and Exodus ignited a global movement. It’s the raw, untold story of metal's birth.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Lot on Your Plate
programme.desc: Host Desiree Nielsen serves up delicious meals for a busy lifestyle from a mouth-watering breakfast burrito to a no-carb cauliflower pizza.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Budae Jjigae
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zac cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Budae Jjigae! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Tuna Casserole
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zac cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Tuna Casserole! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Croque Madame
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Croque Madame! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 The Rochester Garbage Plate
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – The Rochester Garbage Plate! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Flippin Fantastic
programme.desc: The griddle becomes a canvas for creativity as pancakes evolve from humble breakfast fare to colorful works of art. Inventive batters, textures, and toppings transform a simple stack into something worth flipping over.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Taco 'Bout Delicious
programme.desc: Tacos take a turn on the griddle, blending time-honored tradition with new inspiration. Crisped tortillas, inventive fillings, and vibrant toppings come together in a celebration of the world’s most versatile handheld meal.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Searing Steak Perfection
programme.desc: Steak gets the griddle treatment in a celebration of texture and taste. From smoky crusts to tender centers, explore how temperature control and creative seasoning redefine what perfection means on a sizzling surface.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Meet Jacob Ahee
programme.desc: After revealing his DNA results, host Tyrone Edwards accompanies Jacob Ahee on a journey of self-discovery as he explores his newfound roots through food.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Layers of Thai Flavour
programme.desc: Thai host Palin Congchitnant uses fresh Thai ingredients and flavours to make Smoked Trout Salad and a Kaffir Lime Vodka Martini.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 Lamb Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong loves cooking lamb, and with his expert advice, you will too!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 Traditional Japanese Food
programme.desc: Chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen schools us on traditional Japanese foods as she makes tofu rice pockets, miso glazes, and rice flour dumplings.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Hong Kong Foodie Favourites
programme.desc: Cantonese expert Mary Tang showcases traditional dishes from the Chinese coastal territory, Hong Kong. To kick off the episode, Mary rolls up and steams a batch of fluffy Shrimp Dumplings. Next, tender beef with chewy rice noodles and fermented black beans is on the menu. This dish is doused in a fun and tasty dressing featuring salty soy sauce, tart Shaoxing wine, sweet oyster sauce, and a medley of spices. With a sturdy clay pot, Mary then cooks up some savoury Chinese sausage and lays it on a bed of aromatic rice. To top it off, why not some delicious Pineapple Buns? These buns are pillowy and sweet; you'll be surprised to hear that they contain zero pineapple!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 Vietnamese Street Food
programme.desc: There's nothing more authentic than street food - Vietnamese style! Host Lisa Nguyen shares her tips and tricks on tasty Lemongrass-infused Beef Wraps. A vast array of ingredients including peppery betel leaves, gorgeous greens and crunchy peanuts complement the tenderness of flavoursome, marinated ground beef. Lisa's next dish is an iconic Vietnamese street food - crispy Sizzling Crepes with juicy pork belly and earthy vegetables will definitely activate your taste buds. For dessert, Lisa whips up a batch of sweet coconut pudding using beautiful bananas and velvety coconut milk sprinkled with roasted sesame seeds for some crunch.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Sweet and sour are definitely on the menu as Thai-born chef Pailin Chongchitnant whips up glass noodle salad, sour curry, sweet and sour stir fry, and pineapple and lychee in iced syrup.

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Eva Bee
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Eva Bee as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Flippin Fantastic
programme.desc: The griddle becomes a canvas for creativity as pancakes evolve from humble breakfast fare to colorful works of art. Inventive batters, textures, and toppings transform a simple stack into something worth flipping over.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Taco 'Bout Delicious
programme.desc: Tacos take a turn on the griddle, blending time-honored tradition with new inspiration. Crisped tortillas, inventive fillings, and vibrant toppings come together in a celebration of the world’s most versatile handheld meal.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Searing Steak Perfection
programme.desc: Steak gets the griddle treatment in a celebration of texture and taste. From smoky crusts to tender centers, explore how temperature control and creative seasoning redefine what perfection means on a sizzling surface.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Lebanese Take-Out
programme.desc: In just 30 minutes, Chef Spencer Watts whips up a fast and flavourful Lebanese Take-Out for four people.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Indian Take-Out
programme.desc: Spencer Watts cooks an Indian takeout dinner for four in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 More Chinese Take-Out
programme.desc: If you have 30 minutes, then you have time to make Chinese take-out dinner for four people! Chef Spencer Watts cooks up a feast that costs $30.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Animal Care Fundraiser
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Day at the Pool
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Cantonese Seafood
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E19 Gelatin Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong demystifies gelatin, an essential chef's staple ingredient, in this unique and fascinating episode!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E18 Ponzu sauce
programme.desc: Citrus-based ponzu sauce is a favourite in Japanese cuisine, and Chef Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen shows us how to use it, starting with ceviche, then a hotpot, wagyu steak, and ending with shortcake.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Hanoi Specialties
programme.desc: Simple, fun, and magically tasty, some of Vietnam's most delicious and well-known foods come from its capital city of Hanoi. Vietnamese expert Lisa Nguyen shares her knowledge of Hanoi dishes by starting off with a sweet, sour, and spicy papaya salad called Goi Du Du. With a popular nuoc cham dressing featuring sugar, lime juice and Thai chili drizzled over a medley of crunchy carrots, fresh cilantro and mint, chewy papaya, and shrimp, this dish is the perfect balance of wonderful flavours and textures. Also on the menu, grilled-to-perfection Pork Patties with a rich caramel sauce. Fresh fragrant dill and golden turmeric elevate Lisa's next dish as she cooks up some mahi-mahi to enjoy...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Duck Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef-host Craig Wong is our duck sherpa in this well-travelled episode of Cook Like a Chef"... first stop? Peking Duck!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Popular Thai Dishes
programme.desc: Endearing host Pailin Chongchinant makes three popular Thai dishes: Coconut Chicken Soup, Green Papaya Salad, and the most famous, Pad Thai.

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Have Fun
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs make avocado toast and tacos, Liam whips up an easy pantry pasta, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a favorite one pot meal!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Izakaya Bar Bites
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Izakaya-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: chicken yakitori, chili lime edamame, miso soup, veggie tempura, and tuna sashimi!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Movie Night
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a movie night meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: loaded turkey nachos, pizza flavored popcorn, spiced cucumber sticks, and chocolate covered pretzel sticks!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Pool Party
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a pool party meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: grilled steak with chimichurri, spinach salad with pickled radish, and fruit salad with coconut and basil!

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Apples
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular snack recipes, from hosts like Kyle Crawford and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Salmon
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now. we're serving up 8 of our most popular cornbread recipes. from hosts like Natalia Machado and Spencer Watts.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 No Cutlery Required
programme.desc: Say goodbye to dirty cutlery in this One World Kitchen 3 episode featuring Vietnamese finger foods! Talented cook Lisa Nguyen starts off by making delicious Pork Skewer Rolls - perfect for any party! Featuring tender pork, crispy lettuce, fresh mint, crunchy cucumber, and Chinese chives wrapped in soft rice paper, this dish pairs well with a nuoc cham dipping sauce. Sticky Lemongrass Spare Ribs are next up to the plate; steamed and marinated in a garlicy, caramel glaze (yum!). Next, Lisa fries up some tasty Shrimp and Sweet Potato Fritters using a foolproof technique, adding nuoc cham dipping sauce and lovely Bibb lettuce on the side. Finally, fingERS-licking Vietnamese Coffee Cupcakes...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E17 Hot and Cold Recipes
programme.desc: Warm summer weather in Lebanon calls for less time in a piping hot kitchen! Fun host Jasmin Ibrahim prepares a refreshing salad with crunchy pita crisps called Fattoush and pairs it with a juicy chicken kebab. Then, she shows us a traditional Lebanese dish for a rainy day - Lentil Noodle Soup. With delicious brown lentils, warm and citrusy coriander, and tasty Lebanese pita noodles, this dish is sure to warm up your belly. Next, Jasmin cooks up a classic dish from the ancient Mediterranean coastal city of Tripoli. This traditional recipe, called Sayadiyeh, features a crispy fried cod and fluffy rice sprinkled in toasted almond slices. For dessert, Jasmin shows us one of her favourites,...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E24 Hearty Greek Fare
programme.desc: Winters in Greece can get chilly, so fun host Joanna Chery warms us up with some hearty Greek dishes. First, she rolls up some tender Meatballs in a Lemon-Egg Sauce featuring a secret ingredient: rice (shh!). Then, she cooks a vegetarian stew that's packed with tasty artichokes, soft-boiled potatoes, and fragrant dill - great for a cool spring night. To finish, she makes a famous Greek dish called Moussaka. Traditionally eaten at Sunday dinner, this dish emulates the warmth of friends and family. Although it's a two part process - it's packed with layered vegetables, a hearty meat sauce and a creamy béchamel on top - it's so worth it!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Put an Egg on It
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up a healthy and hearty meal for four that cuts down on time without sacrificing flavour.

programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Lebanese Take-Out
programme.desc: In just 30 minutes, Chef Spencer Watts whips up a fast and flavourful Lebanese Take-Out for four people.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Animal Care Fundraiser
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Day at the Pool
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Chef's Graduation
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Picnic Maze Craze
programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. The menu: Grilled Chicken Legs with Crunchy Chip Crust, Smoked Ham with Maple Mustard Glaze, Planked Asparagus Bundles with Cheese and Prosciutto, and Cobb Salad.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Urban Eats
programme.desc: Fa-what? Fa-waffles! Desiree Nielsen cooks up protein-rich falafel waffles for breakfast.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Lettuce Eat Lasagna
programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how salads can be a tasty main AND served warm with a grilled romaine salad.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Asian Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Dev shares stories from his travels while he whips up some of his favorite Asian street food dishes. including Yakitori Skewers from Japan. Pork Buns from China. and Salt and Pepper Crab from Vietnam.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Popular
programme.desc: Chef Dev shares straightforward recipes for street foods that have gained popularity around the world. including Dan Dan Noodles from China. Doner Kebab from Turkey. and Samosas from India.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Peanut Perfection
programme.desc: Chef Dev is joined by his mom. who helps prepare some of their favorite dishes from a trip they took together through Asia. including Gado Gado Salad from Indonesia. Peanut Pancakes from Malaysia. and Pad Thai from Thailand.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ginger Jamboree
programme.desc: Chef Dev is joined by his mom, who helps prepare some of their favorite dishes from their travels together around Asia, including Yakisoba Noodles from Japan, Hainanese Chicken Rice from Singapore, and massive Mandu Dumplings from South Korea.

programme.title: Prophecy Live
programme.desc: Joseph Z's faith-filled journalism and Bible teaching for the Last Days will provide prophetic insights and predictions of global events.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Pastor Travis Johnson challenges believers to stop following Jesus from a distance, live unembarrassed faith, and stand boldly for biblical truth.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Pastor Joel Osteen shepherds the largest and fastest growing congregation in America, following in step with his father's lead when he founded Lakewood Church.

programme.title: Life Today with James & Betty Robison
programme.desc: The author of "Unbreakable Courage" looks at the life of Elijah to learn how to face today's issues with fortitude and faith.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Andrew Wommack shares religious messages about God's Word and discusses how he believes in God's power and his profound teachings.

programme.title: Time with Denise Renner
programme.desc: God doesn't just restore possessions and status: He wants to bring recovery to the body as well.

programme.title: Jesus the Healer with Nancy Dufresne
programme.desc: Host Nancy Dufresne shares messages addressing the topics of faith, healing, renewing the mind, following the Holy Spirit and a life in Christ.

programme.title: Kenneth Copeland
programme.desc: Kenneth and Gloria Copeland teach principles of victorious Christian living through the uncompromising Word of God.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit.

programme.title: Jewish Voice with Jonathan Bernis
programme.desc: Jewish Voice Ministries presents a special program highlighting their medical and spiritual outreach to the "Lost Tribes of Israel."

programme.desc: Dr. Michael Youssef, fundador de la Iglesia de los Apósteles en Atlanta, Georgia, entrega un mensaje poderoso e inspirador sobre la palabra de Dios.

programme.title: Reflections
programme.desc: Disfruta de impresionantes escenas de muchas de las creaciones milagrosas de Dios.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At a 1960s 'Semi D' in Stillorgan, Dermot's vision of a million euro 'Malibu style' house for Rory and Lorna from the west of Ireland descends into an ongoing battle over the style and position of the front door.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In Ashford Co. Wicklow stands the house of Nigel and Frances Coffey. Frances's parents live next door. Several years ago her father built a private road and gave seven plots of land to his seven children.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Claudia and Tom bought this 1920s bungalow with panoramic views of Tramore Bay in 2012 for 305K. Just back from living abroad (Spain, Dubai and Germany) they have been living in the house for the past year.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Glenn Keating and Gustav van der Westhuizen live in Grace Park, Drumcondra, with their 5-year-old son Noah and two pet Weimaraner dogs. They live in an Edwardian terraced three story house. The terrace was originally built for officers of the British Army, between 1897 and 1902. Glenn is a youth worker for LGBTI+ young people in the city centre and Gustav is a banker.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot had a journey to go on with this build with Lisa and Marc.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Laura's expectations from Dermot were high but to get the build to the construction stage was tricky due to the tight budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Paul and Hilary really want to modernise the house that was built originally in the 1970s but they have to be clever with their budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot has a challenge, as he has to work within a tight budget of 210k and has a lot to do for what Jim and Mary want.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Conor and Amy are a young couple who have made the decision to put down roots together by renovating an old farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revealed a plan that would facilitate the old abode to be renovated plus he added a rear extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Carmel and Hugh wanted a home which was going to be manageable for them both going into their later years in life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The Gray family have been living in the house for seventeen years, but they wanted to future proof it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Gráinne Murphy and Ivan Williams have been dreaming about renovating Ivan's forefather's old farmhouse for many years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Brian Carrigg and Kate Molony attempt to renovate a bungalow with a view of the Rock of Cashel that Kate has dreamed of owning all her life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sandra and Daniel Davey bought their dream home in Knocklyon, Dublin over four years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Ann Brannigan and her husband David are attempting to give Ann's former family home in Santry, Dublin a complete renovation.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Eimear Farrell, a single mum and her 8-year-old daughter Hannah with a budget of 20,000 euros (our smallest budget in the series) need the entire downstairs of the 2 bedroomed home in Ballybrack completely re-modelled.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: As it turns out, the only predictable thing about this build are delays caused by Dermot's obsessive attention to detail.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Glasnevin with Terry and Peadar Clarke and their two children Marie Bernadette and Luke.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: Dermot's vision for the house is mirrored by similarly grandiose ambitions for the garden - a wild jungle whose design he hands over to landscaper Diarmuid Gavin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon faces a tough challenge in meeting the design brief and budgetary restraints for the Zambra family who are building an extension in Castleknock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot Bannon helps a couple in Enniscorthy renovate an old cottage and prepare their home for a new baby.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In this week's programme, the penultimate of the series, Dermot finds himself the dream job.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Podge and Jo Ussher want to turn their Wexford cottage from a holiday home into their permanent home without sacrificing any of its 1930s charm.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: They bought their home at the end of the property boom and now it's worth less than they paid for it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Timahoe, Portlaoise with Dolores and Donal O'Connell. Their five children are all grown-up but still live in the area.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Cathy and Michael Keane bought their house when it was being used as a cowshed. They converted it, had four children and over the years Dad, Michael, has added on bits to it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Declan and Judy Cadwell from Clontarf share a small terraced home with their three sons, Christopher 19, Ross 17 and Jake 13. But only just.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marie Duffy moved into her Victorian townhouse off the South Circular Road four years ago. Her friends all thought she was mad to buy it because there was so much work to be done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot encounters a stumbling block or two when he turns his hand to a badly laid out bungalow in Co Offaly.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving into their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 3
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Cape Epic 2025 - Stage 6
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Cape Epic 2025 - Stage 7
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2025 Summer: Full Highlights
programme.desc: The Trans Madeira combines the best that Madeira Island and Porto Santo have to offer with six days of racing in the most diverse terrain in the world! With the addition of a new island, you can expect 250km of riding and more than 30 special stages

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Cheile Grădiștei Round
programme.desc: The WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup 2025 - Cheile Grădiștei Round marks the exciting start to the season of the world's leading e-mountain bike series. Riders from all over the world will be battling for the first points in the championship standings

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Line & Air - with Geraldine Fasnacht
programme.desc: Swiss snowboard legend Géraldine Fasnacht is an experienced pilot. She invites two other freeride greats, Léo Slemett and Emilien Badoux, to join her riding several couloirs at some glaciers of the Swiss and French Alps.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Kayak Expedition Norway "Whitewater Polar Circle"
programme.desc: Today’s episode is an exciting show about a unique kayak expedition to Norway’s white-water treasures at the Arctic Circle. Expect remote mountains, raging rivers and challenging rapids!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Alaska or Bus´t - MTB Roadtrip - Athlete Profile Andrew Taylor (USA)
programme.desc: laska has always been a dream-riding destination for 28-year-old American mountain biker Andrew Taylor. But being over 3,000 miles away from his hometown Santa Cruz, it seemed a bit too far to just jump in the truck and go.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Womens Climbing Part 1 - Female Climbing Heroes - Indoor Bouldering
programme.desc: Year after year, new climbing gyms are built on all continents. The discipline of bouldering, which is unroped climbing above padded mats, primarily enjoys an increase in popularity, most notably among girls and young women.

programme.title: Copa Kitley GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup 2024 – Cauipe (BRA) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: The Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour 2024 will host the second stop of the freestyle discipline in Cauipe in north-eastern Brazil. The Copa Kitley GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup offers intense competitions in the shallow waters.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2024 #45: Freestyle Pro Tour 2024
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesports and the Freestyle Pro Tour 2024! Get ready to witness the world’s best freestylers perform jaw-dropping tricks and intense competition on the water. Let the battle for the title begin - it’s time for freestyle action!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 WOF 2024 #46: GKA Kitesurf World Tour & GWA Wingfoil World Tour Morocco
programme.desc: Welcome to the breathtaking shores of Dakhla, Morocco - where the desert meets the sea. We´ll take you on a jounrey as athletes harness the power of the wind, riding the waves and soaring through the skies in one of the world´s most stunning watersport destinations.

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Monaco - Alpes Maritimes Round
programme.desc: The Monaco Round of the 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup brings elite electric-mountain-bike athletes to one of Europe’s most iconic mountain and coastal regions. The 2025 season features more technically circuits, including multi-line loops and wider, varied tracks

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Olbia Round
programme.desc: The Olbia Round of the WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup brings the world’s fastest electric mountain bikers to the vibrant city of Olbia, in northern Sardinia. Athletes compete for championship points and global recognition

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Massa Marittima Round - 26min HL
programme.desc: Held in the historic Tuscan hilltown of Massa Marittima, the 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup rounds off the international series with a grand finale at the Tenuta il Cicalino estate. Riders from around the globe face steep climbs and fast descents

programme.title: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA)
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA) Stage 1
programme.desc: Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, 800km full-service gravel stage race through South Africa’s diverse landscapes. Starting in coastal forests, the route heads into the breathtaking Great Karoo - a vast, spectacular semi-desert region

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2025 #06: Queen & King of the Court Finals 2024
programme.desc: The stage is set for the 2024 Queen & King of the Court Crown Series Finals in Qatar! The best beach volleyball players will compete against each other in the Aspire Zone. From December 12-14, the best athletes in the world will battle it out for the title.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2024 #04: Queen & King of the Court #04
programme.desc: The sands of Doha are set to witness the grand finale of the 2023 Queen & King of the Court Crown Series, marking the culmination of a thrilling series of events that kicked off in Miami earlier this year.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering
programme.desc: The Forêt de Fontainebleau in France is the largest and most developed bouldering area in the world and home to one of France's most famous climbers - Mélissa Le Nevé, who was the first woman to climb the technical difficulty level 8B+

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Cape Epic Documentary
programme.desc: The 2018 Cape Epic takes riders through 658km through South Africa's Western Cape countryside and up many hills: the total elevation gain will be 13,530m. The race attracts professional and serious amateur participants from around the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Trans Angeles - MTB - Los Angeles (USA)
programme.desc: It's time for Hans Rey to explore Southern California. What better way to do this than with Tim Commerford, a true rock star and one of mountain biking's brightest legends, Missy Giove?

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Trans Napoli - A Mountain Bike Expedition Naples (ITA)
programme.desc: TransNapoli is an urban MTB adventure led by legendary mountain bike pioneer Hans Rey. It is a colorful five-day tour that crosses the Amalfi and Naples regions of Italy on mountain bikes and e-bikes.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 WOF 2026 #08: Motosurf World Championship 2025 - Women & Stock R
programme.desc: The MotoSurf World Championship 2025 – Women & Stock R is part of the global racing series organized under the authority of the Union Internationale Motonautique. It brings together top riders who compete on motorized surfboards in fast and technical water circuits.

programme.title: SFT E-Foil & Wake Foil World Cups Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: The SFT Surf Foil World Tour will stage its SFT Wake Foil and E-Foil World Cups for the first time in the Middle East at the Fahid Island Watersports Festival. The final stop of the 2025 SFT E-Foil season will decide the world tour title.

programme.title: Simple Session 2025 - Skate Finals MEN
programme.desc: Simple Session is back at Unibet Arena in Tallinn, Estonia – celebrating its massive 25-year anniversary! A quarter-century of mind-blowing BMX riding and skateboarding, unforgettable moments, and a global community of athletes pushing the limits.Hoppla!

programme.title: FWT Challenger 2025 X Over Ride Kitzsteinhorn Challenger – Zell am See-Kaprun - Live delayed Part 3
programme.desc: The FWT Challenger 2025 X Over Ride Kitzsteinhorn took place from March 15 to 18, 2025 in Zell am See-Kaprun. At this event as part of the Freeride World Tour qualification series, top freeriders competed against each other on the slopes of the Kitzsteinhorn

programme.title: Gold Coast Marathon 2024

programme.desc: ENGADINSNOW is one of the longest-running freeride competitions in the Alps. This parallel freeride event in Silvaplana is unique worldwide and combines 20 years of innovation and freeriding.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024 - 52min HL (Sailing, Mitte Februar) – International + DACH
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe wants to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean protection during the circumnavigation. By sailing around the world, the Vendée Globe sailors are drawing attention to the fragility of our oceans.

programme.desc: The FWT Challenger 2025 X Over Ride Kitzsteinhorn took place from March 15 to 18, 2025 in Zell am See-Kaprun. At this event as part of the Freeride World Tour qualification series, top freeriders competed against each other on the slopes of the Kitzsteinhorn

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Monaco - Alpes Maritimes Round
programme.desc: The Monaco Round of the 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup brings elite electric-mountain-bike athletes to one of Europe’s most iconic mountain and coastal regions. The 2025 season features more technically circuits, including multi-line loops and wider, varied tracks

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Olbia Round
programme.desc: The Olbia Round of the WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup brings the world’s fastest electric mountain bikers to the vibrant city of Olbia, in northern Sardinia. Athletes compete for championship points and global recognition

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Massa Marittima Round - 26min HL
programme.desc: Held in the historic Tuscan hilltown of Massa Marittima, the 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup rounds off the international series with a grand finale at the Tenuta il Cicalino estate. Riders from around the globe face steep climbs and fast descents

programme.title: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA)
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA) Stage 1
programme.desc: Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, 800km full-service gravel stage race through South Africa’s diverse landscapes. Starting in coastal forests, the route heads into the breathtaking Great Karoo - a vast, spectacular semi-desert region

programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Cape Epic Documentary

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 4 - Utah (USA) – Open Skate

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Stage 4 - SERBIA - 2024
programme.desc: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 14, Martinique
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
programme.desc: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
programme.desc: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 5, Latvia
programme.desc: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Stage 5 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 6, Serbia
programme.desc: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 7, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 8, England
programme.desc: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 9, Finland
programme.desc: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
programme.desc: 38 athletes compete in the under 90kg and under 105kg SCL World Championships. From each weight class, the top 12 qualify for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 11, Romania Part 1
programme.desc: A two day, seven event battle with lots of spectators.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 12, Romania Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Moonen is leading. Part two of the competition in Romania showcases a new challenge - Hercules Hold.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 13, Curacao
programme.desc: In this stage in Curacao no one wants to lose the chance to fight for one kilo gold in World grand finals in Dubai.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 14, Portugal
programme.desc: The last chance to qualify for the World Grand Finale. Zageris and Belsak fight for the better position for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 15, Dubai World grand finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We reach Dubai where we will crown the new champion for SCL 2016. This is part one of the world finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this last episode, the best athletes compete in Pole Push, Deadlift, Forward Hold and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 3, Lithuania
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 5, Serbia
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 6, Canada (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 7, Canada (Part 2)
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 11, Romania
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 12, Curacao
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Stage 6 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E14 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E15 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E16 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E04 GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: The eight-man one-night GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix will crown the baddest light heavyweight striker on the planet. The eight participants are: GLORY champion, #C Tarik Khbabez (58-10-1, 28 KO), Morocco. Former champion, #1 Donegi Abena (27-10, 7 KO), Suriname. Former champion, #2 Sergej Maslobojev (38-6, 23 KO), Lithuania. Undefeated in GLORY, #3 Stefan Latescu (17-2, 8 KO), Romania. ‘Mister Cool’ #4 Ibrahim El Bouni (41-9-1, 22 KO), Morocco. The wild & unpredictable, #5 Bahram Rajabzadeh (67-2, 59 KO), Azerbaijan. Top French light heavyweight, #6 Pascal Toure (20-6, 7 KO), France. Veteran fighter, #7 Bogdan Stoica (58-14, 40 KO), Romania.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: 3 wins to come out on top, who's it going to be? Rico Verhoeven, Levi Rigters, Tarik Osaro, Benjamin Adegbuyi, Sofian Laidouni, Uku Jurjendal, Bahram Rajabzadeh, and Nabil Khachab pair up and throw down for the GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix, an 8-man 1-night heavyweight tournament for the ages.

programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: 3 wins to come out on top, who's it going to be? Rico Verhoeven, Levi Rigters, Tarik Osaro, Benjamin Adegbuyi, Sofian Laidouni, Uku Jurjendal, Bahram Rajabzadeh, and Nabil Khachab pair up and throw down for the GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix, an 8-man 1-night heavyweight tournament for the ages.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E100 K1 WGP 2010 Seoul - Final 16
programme.desc: Final Elimination tournament for the top sixteen Heavyweigh fighters. The winners qualified for the K-1 World GP 2010 Final.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E11 GLORY 90
programme.desc: Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) will put his GLORY welterweight title on the line against ‘House of GLORY’ winner Anwar Ouled-Chaib (3-0) in the main event. In the co-main event, local fan favourite Nabil Khachab (26-4-1, 4 KO) finally gets his opportunity to enter the GLORY Grand Prix as he goes up against Serbia’s Nikola Filipovic (11-2, 6 KO) in a qualifying fight. Number one ranked Enriko Kehl (52-15-2, 30 KO) will be aiming undeniably book his spot as the next title challenger against champion Tyjani Beztati. The German meets the dangerous Arman Hambaryan (58-8-2, 27 KO) of Armenia.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coach Brian Bird takes immense pride in his work, not only with competitive fighters, such as UFC Veteran Nick Ring, but with every athlete who enters his gym. His background is in Karate and Kung Fu. However, watching the first UFC event convinced him that he needed to incorporate grappling and Jiu Jitsu into his coaching arsenal. He now runs a well respected MMA club as a family business... and he most enjoys teaching grappling.
